notes: Active post-release polish hub for cross-frontend CSS maintainability before docs freshness and design-system alignment review.
Do not use this hub to redesign public browser, installed PWA, or admin surfaces.
Runtime cleanup should stay low-friction while main carries active QA work: refresh inventory first, then make only source-grounded CSS ownership/token fixes.
Consume the protected PWA baseline census and implementation-scope updates from client-pwa-design-system-transition instead of duplicating that work.
Primary focus: CSS ownership, undefined custom properties, global selector scope, raw-value/token drift, flexible CSS patterns, and lightweight guardrails.
Public browser components stay client-local and component-authored; installed PWA and admin dialects remain separate.
Contracts lane is n/a; state_api owns only durable scripts/checks, not runtime data/API behavior.
client-pwa-gardener-audit prerequisite completed and archived; CSS maintainability polish is now active as post-release design-system cleanup.

state_api complete on main: scripts/design/check-css-custom-properties.{mjs,test.mjs}, scripts/data/css-custom-property-baseline.tsv (64 audited unresolved entries), and check-tokens.sh wiring. Broad CSS source cleanup and visual QA remain owned by the ui and qa lanes.
2026-05-10 direction: run CSS maintainability before docs freshness and before the broader design-system alignment review.

Audited unresolved entries 64 → 60. Typography.css legacy text tokens (57 entries) and 3 audited font-family-sans/mono entries (5 source-line refs across typography.css + storybook.css) deferred to design judgment; see handoffs/claude-ui.md § Deferred. CSS guard: 2986 var refs / 1003 defs / 60 audited unresolved. Targeted shared toast tests: 13/13 still pass. My 4 source fixes intact. New --admin-sheet-* / --admin-nav-* token family introduced by parallel agent uses explicit fallbacks throughout; guard accepts them.

2026-05-12 reassessment: keep this hub active and reopen it for a second post-churn maintainability pass. Current main HEAD 430fb41a includes later admin chrome/sheet, Storybook parity, PWA dialog, and token-scan changes. Static gates pass: plan-hub validates 19 hubs; CSS guard passes with 3065 var refs / 1005 definitions / 60 audited unresolved; check:design-tokens passes including custom-property, raw-token, Controlled Chrome, and token-version guards. Old blockers about stale generated PWA audit docs and social-preview raw colors are stale as gate blockers, though social-preview remains audited generated-media debt. check:design-generated exits 0 but currently mutates generated/guidance files in this checkout; resolve that dirty-tree side effect before implementation.

2026-05-12 UI lane revamp: previous ui pass remains completed historical work, but the active ui lane is reopened to cover the full CSS maintainability surface before QA. The revamped lane owns source-grounded audit and scoped cleanup decisions across global entrypoints, admin/client/shared/Storybook dialect boundaries, token naming and raw-value drift, custom-property cascade reachability, typography debt, shared Canvas/admin sheet ownership, PWA dialog/scrim ownership, Storybook parity, Tailwind v4 shared-class gotchas, baseline governance, and visual proof requirements.

2026-05-24 modern Web UI follow-up: added reports/modern-web-ui-follow-up-2026-05-24.md and a backlog-style Phase 7 for text-scale readiness, scoped View Transition pilot evaluation, CSS scroll spy, gap decorations, and native dialog/popover consolidation. Lane statuses are unchanged; this is plan truth only.

2026-05-24 Chrome platform operationalization: expanded Phase 7 with CWV/soft-navigation evidence fields, isolated DevTools MCP proof boundaries, and frozen WebMCP approval-spec requirements. Lane statuses are unchanged.

2026-05-24 Codex scope-lock audit on main 06a8108c: runtime CSS stayed read-only. plan-hub validates 21 hubs; CSS guard passes with 3094 var refs / 1005 definitions / 60 audited unresolved; check:design-tokens passes; shared Storybook coverage/quality gates pass; targeted client PWA drawer, shared Canvas sheet, and admin Canvas/Dialog tests pass through package Vitest wrappers. Runtime micro-batch proposed but not approved or implemented.

2026-05-24 approved UI micro-batch completed: installed-PWA drawer/dialog overlays in packages/client/src/styles/pwaDrawerStyles.ts now use --color-scrim; public editorial overlays, admin chrome, shared Canvas geometry, Storybook frames, and the 60 audited typography/font entries were not changed. Proof: plan-hub validates 21 hubs; CSS guard passes with 3096 var refs / 1005 definitions / 60 audited unresolved; check:design-tokens passes; lint:vocab passes; shared Storybook coverage/quality gates pass; client pwaDrawerStyles Vitest 4/4 passes; build:client passes; built CSS emits background-color:var(--color-scrim); Storybook browser proof confirms ModalDrawer overlay rgba(12, 10, 9, 0.22), full viewport coverage, z-index 50, modalSlideIn, 44px close target, and no horizontal overflow.

2026-06-19 QA pass 1 rerun: static CSS maintainability gates and focused package tests passed from an isolated local clone on claude/qa-pass-1/css-maintainability-polish at origin/develop b4257d57. Linear PRD-610 verified live and recorded. Authenticated Brave/browser QA was unavailable, and clean-room Storybook browser execution was also blocked, so qa_pass_1 remains blocked on visual proof rather than passed. QA pass 2 remains blocked.

red.evidence: Guard reported 64 audited unresolved entries with 4 entries pointing at packages/admin/src/components/Hypercerts/DistributionChart.tsx (--color-info-base/dark) and packages/shared/src/components/Toast/toast.service.tsx (--color-primary-strong, --color-text-subtle-600).

green.evidence: CSS custom property guard passed: 2939 var() references, 993 definitions, 60 audited unresolved entries. Drop of 4 confirms source edits + baseline prune are coherent; stale-baseline detection in the script (line 274) would have failed if they drifted.

tdd.note: Mechanical alias renames against tokens already defined in packages/shared/src/styles/theme.css (lines 1386, 1424, 1453-1454). No behavior change, no new tokens. Historical lane validation: plan-hub validate reported 20 hubs and vocab lint passed. At the time of the lane, check:design-generated and check:design-tokens were blocked by unrelated generated-doc and social-preview raw-color failures; current 2026-05-12 reassessment supersedes that blocker state.

green.evidence: 3/3 tests pass: undefined custom property fails, fallbacks/external/baselined references pass, stale baseline entries fail.
